tasks.title: Invite delivery provider adapter contract hardening
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: harden invite delivery provider adapter contract (`send -> sent|failed`) with deterministic error normalization and targeted tests. No provider-specific credentials or prod wiring changes.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.service.test.ts registrar.controller.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.service.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
